Health Summary

Rolling risk metrics compared to their historical distributions. Each cell flags the latest {{windows_label}}-day window against all prior windows of the same length.

{{score_summary}} {{status_counts}}
{{summary_table}}

Metric Distributions

One row per metric. Each panel shows the historical rolling distribution on the analysis scale (log / log-severity transforms where needed — same scale as the z-score). The mean (dashed) and current observation (solid) are marked on that scale; Obs/Mean above each chart stay in original units.

{{metric_rows}}
